description_long: This motorcycle features a classic design with a bright red fuel tank and side panels, contrasted by a black seat and frame. The front is equipped with a round headlight, two amber turn signals, and a set of wide handlebars with visible control cables. The wheels are spoked and fitted with medium-width tires, while the rear includes a red taillight, two additional amber turn signals, and a black exhaust pipe. The engine is exposed and painted black, with visible cooling fins and a kickstand supporting the bike. The overall build suggests a utilitarian, vintage-inspired motorcycle suitable for urban commuting or light recreational use.
description: A vintage-style red and black motorcycle with spoked wheels, round headlight, and exposed engine, designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round headlight, wide handlebars, and front tire aligned centrally.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the red fuel tank, black seat, engine, and spoked wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the taillight, rear turn signals, and the length of the seat.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the exhaust pipe, red side panel, and the overall profile of the motorcycle.

license_info.creator_display_name: Museum of Engineering and Technology, Krakow
